channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Central Pattaya venues
channel.description: Latest gyms, Muay Thai, dive, golf, and sport venues in Central Pattaya, Pattaya.

item.title: Coco Fitness
item.description: Central Pattaya commercial gym on the 4th floor of Mike Shopping Mall. Sea-view cardio, walk-in day passes, towel and locker included, and value monthly pricing.

item.title: Jetts Fitness Pattaya
item.description: 24/7 fitness chain. Royal Garden Plaza branch closed May 2022; Little Walk remains the only Pattaya club. No-contract memberships, modern equipment.

item.title: Pattaya Sports Club
item.description: Multi-sport sports club with tennis and other facilities. Non-profit, ~4,700 active members.

item.title: BOUNCE Pattaya — Trampoline Park
item.description: International trampoline park franchise on 6F Harbor Pattaya Mall. Free Jump arena, slam dunk lane, dodgeball, performance airbag, Mini BOUNCE for toddlers. BOUNCE FIT adult cardio classes. Same building as Deep Climbing + Bean Cow.

item.title: Deep Climbing Gym (Harbor Pattaya)
item.description: Pattaya's first indoor climbing gym. Air-conditioned, 10m wall, ocean theme. Top rope, auto-belay, lead, bouldering routes.

item.title: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
item.description: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.

item.title: Pattaya Beach Public Aerobics — Open-Air Free Fitness
item.description: FREE open-air group fitness on Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach boardwalks. Daily Zumba aerobics, dance fitness, yoga, tai chi, stretching. No fee, no signup. Genuine Thai cultural fitness phenomenon. Pattaya most underrated daily wellness routine.

item.title: Megabreak Pool Hall Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya’s most respected dedicated pool hall. Tournament-class 9-foot pool tables + snooker. Long-running expat institution on Soi Diana, central Pattaya. ฿200–฿400/hour walk-in.

item.title: Holiday Inn Pattaya
item.description: 4-star Beach Road IHG. Two outdoor infinity pools (Bay Tower L4 + Executive Tower L6), modern fitness centre with Pattaya Bay views, Tea Tree Spa, Kids Club. Central beachfront family-friendly stay.

item.title: Dusit Thani Pattaya — Devarana Wellness
item.description: Iconic 5-star Thai-heritage resort since 1973. Devarana Wellness with cascading waterfall garden, fitness centre, traditional Thai massage, yoga, meditation, active stretching. Two oceanfront pools + two private beaches + tennis history.

item.title: WKO Muay Thai & Fitness Pattaya (ISS Gym)
item.description: Owner Sifu McInnes was first Westerner to ref Lumpinee (1993). Resident trainer Sakmongkol (231-20-4, 3x Lumpinee, 5x WMC). ~฿4,000/month.

item.title: Battle Conquer Gym Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's only fully air-conditioned Muay Thai gym. Weight room, sauna, ice plunge. 7-day flexible scheduling, English-speaking trainers.

item.title: Pattaya Thai Boxing & Fitness Gym (Jomtien)
item.description: Walk-in budget gym in Jomtien. ~฿300 for equipment + 4-5 rounds of pads. Pro fighter Champ on roster. Air fans, no AC.

item.title: Tony's Fitness Gym (Tony's Group Pattaya)
item.description: Legendary old-school bodybuilding gym. Massive free-weights, no-frills, low monthly. A Pattaya institution.

item.title: Platinum Fitness Club
item.description: Pattaya Klang central commercial gym with 17.5-hour daily operating window (05:30-23:00), full air-conditioning, comprehensive cardio + weight machines, group classes, and sauna.

item.title: Fitness 7 Pattaya (The Avenue)
item.description: 2000+ sqm, 24-hour gym in Avenue Pattaya. Cardio, weights, free weights, boxing ring, functional training areas.

item.title: True Fitness Pattaya
item.description: Popular fitness chain: HIIT, yoga, spinning. Modern facility, group classes, nutrition counseling.

item.title: SUN Fitness Pattaya (3 branches)
item.description: 3-branch chain across Pattaya — single membership accesses all. Soi Buakhao + Naklua branches.

item.title: Manhattan Pattaya (Hotel Gym)
item.description: Manhattan Pattaya hotel gym on Pratamnak / Central Pattaya — fitness equipment, outdoor swimming pool, and day-pass access for non-guests within walking distance of beach.

item.title: Yoga Haus Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's most prominent hot yoga studio. Modern fitness-yoga vibe with Hot Yoga and Fit Ball. Walkable central.

item.title: Pattaya Tennis Club
item.description: Central Pattaya outdoor tennis facility with multiple floodlit hard courts, coaching for all levels, equipment rental, drop-in pickup play, and member-led social leagues.

item.title: Greta Sport Club Pattaya (at Greta Resort)
item.description: 6 covered tennis courts with rain protection. Beautifully constructed roofed tennis venue.

item.title: Siam Bayshore Resort Pattaya Tennis Courts
item.description: Siam Bayshore Resort tennis courts on Walking Street area / South Pattaya Beach Road — 3 outdoor hard courts open to hotel guests and day visitors.

item.title: Diamond Badminton
item.description: South Pattaya badminton facility on Pattaya 3rd Road with multiple wood-floor courts available for hourly hire, plus equipment rental and casual play nights.

item.title: Hard Rock Pool Pattaya
item.description: Hard Rock Hotel Pattaya iconic guitar-shaped 2,000 sqm free-form pool with artificial sand beach, swim-up bar, and day-pass access for non-guests on Beach Road.

item.title: Mermaid's Dive Center
item.description: PADI 5-Star IDC dive center. Day trips, courses beginner to instructor, technical diving.

item.title: Pattaya Dive Centre
item.description: Pattaya's only Beach Road PADI Dive Centre. 24+ years established. All PADI courses + Tec.

item.title: Seafari PADI Dive Centre
item.description: PADI dive center 2 minutes from Pattaya Beach Road behind Mike's Mall — full course progression from Open Water through Divemaster, plus daily fun-dives to Pattaya islands.

item.title: AF Academy Football School
item.description: Football school for children. Coaches with international children's coaching experience. Indoor + outdoor fields.

item.title: Golf Hub Pattaya (Indoor Simulator + Club Fitting)
item.description: Only premium indoor simulator + club fitting in Pattaya. TrackMan / GC Quad launch monitor. AC year-round practice. Multiple locations.
